title: LED Bedside Lamps with 20W USB Charging Port, Table Lamp with Colour Changing, Touch Lamps Bedside Dimmable Night Light with Timer & Memory for Living Room Bedroom Office Nursery
features: 【Charging+Lighting】LED Bedside lamps for bedroom equipped with 2 charging ports, USB-C and USB-A, which can well meet your charging needs for a variety of devices. The bedside lamp with 20W USB charging port integrates lighting and charging to make your life more convenient.

【Touch Dimming】Just long press the "+" or "-" button to freely select the brightness of the baby night light kids among 5%-100%. The adjustable light is soft and non-dazzling, providing your family with a good sleep and warm company.

【Timing & Memory Function】When you and your family fall asleep, the table lamps for living room can be set to automatically turn off at a scheduled time. The lamp has a memory function so you don't have to readjust the brightness and color when you turn it on again, which avoids glare.

【Colorful Atmosphere】Touch lamps bedside has 9 colour changing and 3 light modes. Dimmable night light's light can create a romantic and warm atmosphere at night, which makes it perfect for use in living rooms, parties, birthdays and bedroom decor.

【Perfect Gift】The bedside table lamps with unique wood grain is exquisite and compact. The bedside lamp is an ideal gift for holiday, birthdays, Halloween or Christmas. If you are in any way dissatisfied with the Bedside Lamp, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description Previous page 2 Charging Port & 1 Lamp Equipped with 2 charging ports, USB-C and USB-A, which can meet your charging needs for many devices Take care of your eyes all the time The brightness can be adjusted between 5-100%, which can protect your eyes. Automatically turn off the lamp The lights can be set to turn off automatically after 1/2/3 hours. DIY Personalized Room Atmosphere 9 colorful lights and 3 modes of light changing for a variety of ambient experiences. Turn on the light in the dark Raised switch design for you to be easier to touch the bedside lamp at night Next page 1 2 In 1 2 5%-100% Dimming 3 Timer Off Function 4 RGB Colorful Changing 5 Easy To Touch The Operation Instruction of the Symbol on the Touch Pad Bulb (in the middle) Long touch to turn on or off the dimmable night light, short touch to switch between cool white and warm white. + Long touch to increase brightness of the led lamps for bedroom, short touch to switch colours. - Long touch to decrease brightness of the baby night light newborn, short touch to switch colours. M Short touch to switch the colour change mode between blinking, breathing and gradient. Clock Short touch to change the time the table lights for bedroom turns off. Short touch once, the light flashes once and the night lamp is switched off after one hour. And so on, with two flashes, the bedroom lampe is switched off after two hours. Flash three times and the small lamp turns off after three hours. If you switch the bed lamp off, the timer function is cancelled. Is this bedside lamp compatible with 110V and 220V voltage? It is compatible with AC 100-250V, 50/60HZ and suitable for United Kingdom home use. What devices can be charged by this lamp? It supports all devices with USB-A/Type-C charging ports under 20W charging. For example: phones, Pads, smartwatches, headphones, power banks, shavers, electric toothbrushes and other devices. And you don't need to keep the light on when charging. Is it convenient for the elderly or children to turn on the lamp? Certainly yes! Even in the night you can easily to turn on the lamp because of the "Raised switch design" on the center of the touch pad.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎2 Charging Port, Bulb, UK Plug Power
